Home / Services / Concrete Slabs

Concrete Slabs

Durable and versatile concrete slabs for various applications.

De Marco Concrete specializes in pouring high-quality concrete slabs for a wide range of applications, including garages, sheds, workshops, and commercial buildings. We understand the importance of proper preparation and reinforcement to ensure a level and durable slab that will withstand heavy use. We offer a variety of finishes, including smooth, broom, and textured, to suit your specific needs. Our team has extensive experience pouring slabs of all sizes and thicknesses, and we use only the highest-quality materials to ensure a long-lasting and reliable surface. Whether you need a slab for a new garage, a storage shed, or a commercial warehouse, De Marco Concrete has the expertise and experience to get the job done right. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper drainage and preventing cracking or settling.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site preparation and grading
  2. 02 Step 2: Formwork and reinforcement
  3. 03 Step 3: Concrete pouring and leveling
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing and curing

Benefits

  • Durable and long-lasting surface
  • Versatile for various applications
  • Level and stable foundation
  • Cost-effective solution

Frequently Asked Questions

How thick should a concrete slab be?

The thickness of a concrete slab depends on the intended use. For a garage or shed, a 4-inch slab is typically sufficient. For heavier loads, a thicker slab may be required.

What type of reinforcement is used in concrete slabs?

We typically use rebar or wire mesh to reinforce concrete slabs. This helps to prevent cracking and increase the overall strength of the slab.

How long does it take for a concrete slab to cure?

Concrete typically takes 28 days to fully cure. However, it can be used after 7 days, although it will not have reached its full strength.
